001import java.util.HashMap;
002import java.util.Set;
003
004/**
005 * Room class - represents a single location in the "Henriette's Feast" game.
006 * Each room has a text description and exits to neighboring rooms,
007 * stored in a HashMap that maps directions (e.g. "north", "up") to rooms.
008 *
009 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
010 * @version 2026.05.09
011 */
012public class Room {
013    private final String aDescription;
014    private final HashMap<String, Room> aExits;
015    private final String aImageName;
016    private ItemList aItems;
017
018    /**
019     * Creates a room with the given description and image.
020     *
021     * @param pDescription the textual description of this room
022     * @param pImageName the name of the image file for this room
023     */
024    public Room(final String pDescription, final String pImageName) {
025        this.aDescription = pDescription;
026        this.aExits = new HashMap<String, Room>();
027        this.aImageName = pImageName;
028        this.aItems = new ItemList();
029    }
030
031
032    /**
033     * Returns the name of the image associated with this room.
034     *
035     * @return the image name
036     */
037    public String getImageName() {
038        return this.aImageName;
039    }
040
041    /**
042     * Returns the description of this room.
043     *
044     * @return the room description
045     */
046    public String getDescription() {
047        return this.aDescription;
048    }
049
050    /**
051     * Returns a long description of this room, including its exits,
052     * in the form: "You are in the kitchen.\nExits : north east".
053     *
054     * @return a detailed description of this room
055     */
056    public String getLongDescription() {
057        return "You are " + this.aDescription + ".\n"
058                + this.getExitString() + ".\n"
059                + this.getItemString();
060    }
061
062    /**
063     * Defines an exit from this room in the given direction.
064     *
065     * @param pDirection the direction of the exit (e.g. "north", "east", "up")
066     * @param pNeighbor  the neighboring room in that direction
067     */
068    public void setExit(final String pDirection, final Room pNeighbor) {
069        this.aExits.put(pDirection, pNeighbor);
070    }
071
072    /**
073     * Returns the neighboring room in the given direction, or null
074     * if there is no exit in that direction.
075     *
076     * @param pDirection the direction of the desired exit
077     * @return the neighboring room, or null if none
078     */
079    public Room getExit(final String pDirection) {
080        return this.aExits.get(pDirection);
081    }
082
083    /**
084     * Adds an item to this room.
085     *
086     * @param pItem the item to add
087     */
088    public void addItem(final Item pItem) {
089        this.aItems.addItem(pItem);
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * Returns the item with the given name, or null if not found.
094     * @param pName the name of the item to retrieve
095     * @return the Item object, or null if not found
096     */
097    public Item getItem(final String pName) {
098        return this.aItems.getItem(pName);
099    }
100
101    /**
102     * Removes the item with the given name from this room.
103     * @param pName the name of the item to remove
104     */
105    public void removeItem(final String pName) {
106        this.aItems.removeItem(pName);
107    }
108
109    /**
110     * Returns a string listing all items currently in the room.
111     *
112     * @return a description of the items in the room
113     */
114    public String getItemString() {
115        return this.aItems.getItemString();
116    }
117
118    /**
119     * Builds and returns a string listing all available exits
120     * from this room, in the form "Exits : north east up".
121     *
122     * @return a string describing the exits of this room
123     */
124    public String getExitString() {
125        StringBuilder vExitString = new StringBuilder("Exits :");
126        Set<String> vKeys = this.aExits.keySet();
127
128        for (String vDirection : vKeys) {
129            vExitString.append(" ").append(vDirection);
130        }
131        return vExitString.toString();
132    }
133} // Room
